description: Alice quotes what Marcus said about a potential Wednesday team lunch, but both speakers dismiss it as non-serious. The event is explicitly doubted and not endorsed by the calendar owner.

mock_llm_response.summary: No actionable calendar events found. The Wednesday team lunch is a quote of what Marcus said, not a scheduling directive from Alice. Both speakers explicitly doubt the event will happen ('I don't think he was seriously proposing it', 'I'll believe it when I see the calendar invite').

notes: Quotation vs. instruction distinction. Alice is relaying what someone else said, not making a scheduling request herself. The additional context ('never actually follows through', 'don't hold your breath') makes clear there is no real commitment.
